theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Modified for 'Secure Vault' Stealth
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Cinematic, moody, highly secure, expensive, functional. Avoid standard 'gamer' purple/neon aesthetics. Aim for an elite, enterprise-grade privacy tool feel.
theme_and_archetype.twist: Rely on texture (grain/noise overlays) and precise lighting (1px inner borders, subtle glows) instead of flat dark colors.

background.description: Deepest slate for the main app canvas/body.

surface.description: Panels (like sidebars and message areas) use semi-transparent slate-900 over a noisy background to create depth.

primary.description: A sharp, tactical green signaling secure operations and active states. Used sparingly for main CTAs and 'Online' status.

rules.headings: font-light to font-medium, tracking-tight. NEVER use generic sans or Inter. Use Outfit for a crisp, geometric tech feel.
rules.mono: Use for timestamps, file sizes, IP logs, and encryption keys. tracking-widest for labels.

layout_and_spacing.description: Density, Data Correlation, and Scanability. Every pixel must be utilized efficiently. Use sharp edges or minimal rounding (max 8px).

structure.app_shell: Use h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden. Sidebar fixed width (e.g., w-64), Main Content flex-1.
structure.server_nav: Extreme left, w-16 or w-20, densely packed server icons.
structure.members_panel: w-64 bg-slate-900/30 border-l border-white/5 hidden lg:block.

technical_rules: Mobile-first: App must collapse into single-column with hamburger menu for sidebars.
Grid children must be direct children. Use align-self: stretch for columns.
Ensure scrollable areas (messages) have customized scrollbars (dark, thin, no gutter).

surfaces.glassmorphism: Use for sticky headers/floating modals. backdrop-blur-2xl bg-slate-950/60 with a 1px border-b border-white/10.
surfaces.cards: Flat background (slate-900), 1px border-white/5, NO heavy drop shadows. Sharp or 8px max radius.

inputs.chat_input: bg-slate-900 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-slate-100 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500/50 outline-none.
inputs.forms: Use Shadcn customized primitives. Avoid native select/date inputs.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-500 text-slate-950 font-medium hover:bg-emerald-400 transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 text-slate-100 border border-white/5 hover:bg-slate-700 transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2

chat_bubbles.style: Do NOT use rounded 'iMessage' bubbles. Use a clean, horizontal row layout (Avatar left, Name/Time top, Message bottom) similar to Slack/Discord professional mode. Transparent background for messages, hover effect (bg-slate-900/50) for actions.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.
motion_and_interactions.chat_feed: Subtle entrance animation for new messages (fade-in, slide-up 4px).

icons_and_assets.usage: Use standard or duotone weight for a technical, precise look. Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react

hero_background.description: Dark, moody abstract texture for the Web Landing Page hero background. Overlay with bg-slate-950/80.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over dark backgrounds meets APCA standards. Muted text should not be darker than slate-500.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='chat-message-input').
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All actionable items must have explicit focus states with higher contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize the Web UI (PWA) first. Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the landing page, and heavily customized Shadcn for the main application.
Theme is strictly DARK. Do not implement a light theme unless specifically toggled.
Implement WebRTC placeholders for voice/video UI showing quality selectors up to 2160p 60fps.
For the 'Share Drive' feature, use a grid or detailed list layout resembling a highly secure file manager (like an encrypted vault), utilizing monospace fonts for file sizes.
Admin Dashboard must utilize the 'Control Room' grid layout with dense data visualization (use Recharts with emerald and slate accents).

In the chat UI, include a message history feed and input box with options for attachments, screen sharing, and user status indicators (Online, Away, Busy, Invisible) matching the defined status colors.
